Meaning.Vi: Cây cọc, cột dài, thường bằng kim loại hoặc gỗ
Meaning.En: A long, slender rod or staff, typically made of metal or wood, used for various purposes such as supporting structures or in sports.
Meaning.Example: The construction workers drove a steel pole into the ground to support the new fence.

Situation.Vi: Sử dụng trong xây dựng hoặc lắp đặt hàng rào.
Situation.En: Used in construction or fence installation.

Situation.Vi: Trong thể thao, như nhảy sào.
Situation.En: In sports, such as pole vaulting.

Meaning.En: The north or south end of a magnet or battery, where the magnetic or electrical force is strongest.
Meaning.Example: The compass needle points toward the Earth’s magnetic north pole.

Situation.Vi: Trong vật lý hoặc điện tử, khi nói về cực của thiết bị.
Situation.En: In physics or electronics, when referring to the terminals of a device.

Meaning.Vi: Cực (Trái Đất): Cực Bắc hoặc Cực Nam
Meaning.En: One of the two points, North or South, where the Earth’s axis of rotation intersects its surface.
Meaning.Example: Explorers aimed to reach the geographic North Pole.

Situation.Vi: Trong địa lý hoặc hàng hải, khi nói về cực Trái Đất.
Situation.En: In geography or navigation, when referring to Earth’s poles.
